title: Machaneh-Dan #4265
definition:
Mahaneh-dan = "camp of Dan"

 1) campsite of the tribe of Dan; place behind Kirjath-jearim and
    between Zorah and Eshtaol
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mahaneh-dan = "camp of Dan"

 1) campsite of the tribe of Dan; place behind Kirjath-jearim and
    between Zorah and Eshtaol

    NASB:  camp of Dan, a place where the Danites stayed
